title: TONEMAC H7 Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth, 80H Long Playtime, ANC Hi-Fi Audio, 40mm Big Bass, Comfortable Fit, Clear Calls, Bluetooth 5.3

features: [Active Noise Cancelling] 2 internal and 2 external mics work in tandem to detect external noise and effectively reduce up to 90% of it, such as planes and car engines.

[Immerse Yourself in Detailed Audio] Come with Bluetooth 5.3 chipsets and 40mm dynamic drivers, which provide lossless transmission and low latency and create deep, rich bass stereo, you’ll hear every note with a new sense of vividness via the over-ear headphones.

[80-Hour Long Battery Life and Fast Charging] With 65 hours of battery life with ANC on and 80 hours in normal mode, you can commute in peace with your Bluetooth headphones without thinking about recharging. Fast charge for 5 mins to get an extra 6 hours of playtime.

Dual-Connections: Connect to two devices simultaneously with Bluetooth 5.3 and instantly switch between them. Whether you're working on your laptop, or need to take a phone call, audio from your Bluetooth headphones will automatically play from the device you need to hear from.
[COMFORT & DURABILITY] Crafted with protein leather ear cushions and memory foam, the H7 ensures comfort during extended use, while the IPX4 rating protects against dust and water.
